members.name: AddRootNode
members.summary: Makes [param node] root of the currently opened scene. Only works if the scene is empty. If the [param node] is a scene instance, an inheriting scene will be created.

members.name: CloseScene
members.summary: Closes the currently active scene, discarding any pending changes in the process. Returns [constant OK] on success or [constant ERR_DOES_NOT_EXIST] if there is no scene to close.

members.name: EditNode
members.summary: Edits the given [Node]. The node will be also selected if it's inside the scene tree.

members.name: EditResource
members.summary: Edits the given [Resource]. If the resource is a [Script] you can also edit it with [method edit_script] to specify the line and column position.

members.name: EditScript
members.signature: public void EditScript(Script script, int line, int column, bool grabFocus)
members.summary: Edits the given [Script]. The line and column on which to open the script can also be specified. The script will be open with the user-configured editor for the script's language which may be an external editor.

members.name: GetBaseControl
members.summary: Returns the main container of Godot editor's window. For example, you can use it to retrieve the size of the container and place your controls accordingly. [b]Warning:[/b] Removing and freeing this node will render the editor useless and may cause a crash.

members.name: GetCommandPalette
members.summary: Returns the editor's [EditorCommandPalette] instance. [b]Warning:[/b] Removing and freeing this node will render a part of the editor useless and may cause a crash.

members.name: GetCurrentDirectory
members.summary: Returns the current directory being viewed in the [FileSystemDock]. If a file is selected, its base directory will be returned using [method String.get_base_dir] instead.

members.name: GetCurrentFeatureProfile
members.summary: Returns the name of the currently activated feature profile. If the default profile is currently active, an empty string is returned instead. In order to get a reference to the [EditorFeatureProfile], you must load the feature profile using [method EditorFeatureProfile.load_from_file]. [b]Note:[/b] Feature profiles created via the user interface are loaded from the [code]feature_profiles[/code] directory, as a file with the [code].profile[/code] extension. The editor configuration folder can be found by using [method EditorPaths.get_config_dir].

members.name: GetCurrentPath
members.summary: Returns the current path being viewed in the [FileSystemDock].

members.name: GetEditedSceneRoot
members.summary: Returns the edited (current) scene's root [Node].

members.name: GetEditorLanguage
members.summary: Returns the language currently used for the editor interface.

members.name: GetEditorMainScreen
members.summary: Returns the editor control responsible for main screen plugins and tools. Use it with plugins that implement [method EditorPlugin._has_main_screen]. [b]Note:[/b] This node is a [VBoxContainer], which means that if you add a [Control] child to it, you need to set the child's [member Control.size_flags_vertical] to [constant Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL] to make it use the full available space. [b]Warning:[/b] Removing and freeing this node will render a part of the editor useless and may cause a crash.

members.name: GetEditorPaths
members.summary: Returns the [EditorPaths] singleton.

members.name: GetEditorScale
members.summary: Returns the actual scale of the editor UI ([code]1.0[/code] being 100% scale). This can be used to adjust position and dimensions of the UI added by plugins. [b]Note:[/b] This value is set via the [member EditorSettings.interface/editor/appearance/display_scale] and [member EditorSettings.interface/editor/appearance/custom_display_scale] settings. The editor must be restarted for changes to be properly applied.

members.name: GetEditorSettings
members.summary: Returns the editor's [EditorSettings] instance.

members.name: GetEditorTheme
members.summary: Returns the editor's [Theme]. [b]Note:[/b] When creating custom editor UI, prefer accessing theme items directly from your GUI nodes using the [code]get_theme_*[/code] methods.

members.name: GetEditorToaster
members.summary: Returns the editor's [EditorToaster].

members.name: GetEditorUndoRedo
members.summary: Returns the editor's [EditorUndoRedoManager].

members.name: GetEditorViewport2d
members.summary: Returns the 2D editor [SubViewport]. It does not have a camera. Instead, the view transforms are done directly and can be accessed with [member Viewport.global_canvas_transform].

members.name: GetEditorViewport3d
members.summary: Returns the specified 3D editor [SubViewport], from [code]0[/code] to [code]3[/code]. The viewport can be used to access the active editor cameras with [method Viewport.get_camera_3d].

members.name: GetFileSystemDock
members.summary: Returns the editor's [FileSystemDock] instance. [b]Warning:[/b] Removing and freeing this node will render a part of the editor useless and may cause a crash.

members.name: GetInspector
members.summary: Returns the editor's [EditorInspector] instance. [b]Warning:[/b] Removing and freeing this node will render a part of the editor useless and may cause a crash.

members.name: GetNode3dRotateSnap
members.summary: Returns the amount of degrees the 3D editor's rotational snapping is set to.

members.name: GetNode3dScaleSnap
members.summary: Returns the amount of units the 3D editor's scale snapping is set to.

members.name: GetNode3dTranslateSnap
members.summary: Returns the amount of units the 3D editor's translation snapping is set to.

members.name: GetOpenSceneRoots
members.summary: Returns an array with references to the root nodes of the currently opened scenes.

members.name: GetOpenScenes
members.summary: Returns an array with the file paths of the currently opened scenes.

members.name: GetPlayingScene
members.summary: Returns the name of the scene that is being played. If no scene is currently being played, returns an empty string.

members.name: GetResourceFilesystem
members.summary: Returns the editor's [EditorFileSystem] instance.

members.name: GetResourcePreviewer
members.summary: Returns the editor's [EditorResourcePreview] instance.

members.name: GetScriptEditor
members.summary: Returns the editor's [ScriptEditor] instance. [b]Warning:[/b] Removing and freeing this node will render a part of the editor useless and may cause a crash.

members.name: GetSelectedPaths
members.summary: Returns an array containing the paths of the currently selected files (and directories) in the [FileSystemDock].

members.name: GetSelection
members.summary: Returns the editor's [EditorSelection] instance.

members.name: GetUnsavedScenes
members.summary: Returns an array of file paths of currently unsaved scenes.

members.name: InspectObject
members.signature: public void InspectObject(Object @object, String forProperty, bool inspectorOnly)
members.summary: Shows the given property on the given [param object] in the editor's Inspector dock. If [param inspector_only] is [code]true[/code], plugins will not attempt to edit [param object].

members.name: IsMultiWindowEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if multiple window support is enabled in the editor. Multiple window support is enabled if [i]all[/i] of these statements are true: - [member EditorSettings.interface/multi_window/enable] is [code]true[/code]. - [member EditorSettings.interface/editor/display/single_window_mode] is [code]false[/code]. - [member Viewport.gui_embed_subwindows] is [code]false[/code]. This is forced to [code]true[/code] on platforms that don't support multiple windows such as Web, or when the [code]--single-window[/code] [url=$DOCS_URL/tutorials/editor/command_line_tutorial.html]command line argument[/url] is used.

members.name: IsNode3dSnapEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the 3D editor currently has snapping mode enabled, and [code]false[/code] otherwise.

members.name: IsObjectEdited
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the object has been marked as edited through [method set_object_edited].

members.name: IsPlayingScene
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a scene is currently being played, [code]false[/code] otherwise. Paused scenes are considered as being played.

members.name: IsPluginEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified [param plugin] is enabled. The plugin name is the same as its directory name.

members.name: MakeMeshPreviews
members.signature: public Texture2D[] MakeMeshPreviews(Mesh[] meshes, int previewSize)
members.summary: Returns mesh previews rendered at the given size as an [Array] of [Texture2D]s.

members.name: MarkSceneAsUnsaved
members.summary: Marks the current scene tab as unsaved.

members.name: OpenSceneFromPath
members.signature: public void OpenSceneFromPath(String sceneFilepath, bool setInherited)
members.summary: Opens the scene at the given path. If [param set_inherited] is [code]true[/code], creates a new inherited scene.

members.name: PlayCurrentScene
members.summary: Plays the currently active scene.

members.name: PlayCustomScene
members.summary: Plays the scene specified by its filepath.

members.name: PlayMainScene
members.summary: Plays the main scene.

members.name: PopupCreateDialog
members.signature: public void PopupCreateDialog(Callable callback, StringName baseType, String currentType, String dialogTitle, StringName[] typeBlocklist)
members.summary: Pops up an editor dialog for creating an object. The [param callback] must take a single argument of type [String], which will contain the type name of the selected object (or the script path of the type, if the type is created from a script), or be an empty string if no item is selected. The [param base_type] specifies the base type of objects to display. For example, if you set this to "Resource", all types derived from [Resource] will display in the create dialog. The [param current_type] will be passed in the search box of the create dialog, and the specified type can be immediately selected when the dialog pops up. If the [param current_type] is not derived from [param base_type], there will be no result of the type in the dialog. The [param dialog_title] allows you to define a custom title for the dialog. This is useful if you want to accurately hint the usage of the dialog. If the [param dialog_title] is an empty string, the dialog will use "Create New 'Base Type'" as the default title. The [param type_blocklist] contains a list of type names, and the types in the blocklist will be hidden from the create dialog. [b]Note:[/b] Trying to list the base type in the [param type_blocklist] will hide all types derived from the base type from the create dialog.

members.name: PopupDialog
members.signature: public void PopupDialog(Window dialog, Rect2i rect)
members.summary: Pops up the [param dialog] in the editor UI with [method Window.popup_exclusive]. The dialog must have no current parent, otherwise the method fails. See also [method Window.set_unparent_when_invisible].

members.name: PopupDialogCentered
members.signature: public void PopupDialogCentered(Window dialog, Vector2i minsize)
members.summary: Pops up the [param dialog] in the editor UI with [method Window.popup_exclusive_centered]. The dialog must have no current parent, otherwise the method fails. See also [method Window.set_unparent_when_invisible].

members.name: PopupDialogCenteredClamped
members.signature: public void PopupDialogCenteredClamped(Window dialog, Vector2i minsize, float fallbackRatio)
members.summary: Pops up the [param dialog] in the editor UI with [method Window.popup_exclusive_centered_clamped]. The dialog must have no current parent, otherwise the method fails. See also [method Window.set_unparent_when_invisible].

members.name: PopupDialogCenteredRatio
members.signature: public void PopupDialogCenteredRatio(Window dialog, float ratio)
members.summary: Pops up the [param dialog] in the editor UI with [method Window.popup_exclusive_centered_ratio]. The dialog must have no current parent, otherwise the method fails. See also [method Window.set_unparent_when_invisible].

members.name: PopupMethodSelector
members.signature: public void PopupMethodSelector(Object @object, Callable callback, String currentValue)
members.summary: Pops up an editor dialog for selecting a method from [param object]. The [param callback] must take a single argument of type [String] which will contain the name of the selected method or be empty if the dialog is canceled. If [param current_value] is provided, the method will be selected automatically in the method list, if it exists.

members.name: PopupNodeSelector
members.signature: public void PopupNodeSelector(Callable callback, StringName[] validTypes, Node currentValue)
members.summary: Pops up an editor dialog for selecting a [Node] from the edited scene. The [param callback] must take a single argument of type [NodePath]. It is called on the selected [NodePath] or the empty path [code]^""[/code] if the dialog is canceled. If [param valid_types] is provided, the dialog will only show Nodes that match one of the listed Node types. If [param current_value] is provided, the Node will be automatically selected in the tree, if it exists. [b]Example:[/b] Display the node selection dialog as soon as this node is added to the tree for the first time: [codeblock] func _ready(): if Engine.is_editor_hint(): EditorInterface.popup_node_selector(_on_node_selected, ["Button"]) func _on_node_selected(node_path): if node_path.is_empty(): print("node selection canceled") else: print("selected ", node_path) [/codeblock]

members.name: PopupPropertySelector
members.signature: public void PopupPropertySelector(Object @object, Callable callback, PackedInt32Array typeFilter, String currentValue)
members.summary: Pops up an editor dialog for selecting properties from [param object]. The [param callback] must take a single argument of type [NodePath]. It is called on the selected property path (see [method NodePath.get_as_property_path]) or the empty path [code]^""[/code] if the dialog is canceled. If [param type_filter] is provided, the dialog will only show properties that match one of the listed [enum Variant.Type] values. If [param current_value] is provided, the property will be selected automatically in the property list, if it exists. [codeblock] func _ready(): if Engine.is_editor_hint(): EditorInterface.popup_property_selector(this, _on_property_selected, [TYPE_INT]) func _on_property_selected(property_path): if property_path.is_empty(): print("property selection canceled") else: print("selected ", property_path) [/codeblock]

members.name: PopupQuickOpen
members.signature: public void PopupQuickOpen(Callable callback, StringName[] baseTypes)
members.summary: Pops up an editor dialog for quick selecting a resource file. The [param callback] must take a single argument of type [String] which will contain the path of the selected resource or be empty if the dialog is canceled. If [param base_types] is provided, the dialog will only show resources that match these types. Only types deriving from [Resource] are supported.

members.name: ReloadSceneFromPath
members.summary: Reloads the scene at the given path. Fails if the scene is not open.

members.name: RestartEditor
members.summary: Restarts the editor. This closes the editor and then opens the same project. If [param save] is [code]true[/code], the project will be saved before restarting.

members.name: SaveAllScenes
members.summary: Saves all opened scenes in the editor.

members.name: SaveScene
members.summary: Saves the currently active scene. Returns either [constant OK] or [constant ERR_CANT_CREATE].

members.name: SaveSceneAs
members.signature: public void SaveSceneAs(String path, bool withPreview)
members.summary: Saves the currently active scene as a file at [param path].

members.name: SelectFile
members.summary: Selects the file, with the path provided by [param file], in the FileSystem dock.

members.name: SetCurrentFeatureProfile
members.summary: Selects and activates the specified feature profile with the given [param profile_name]. Set [param profile_name] to an empty string to reset to the default feature profile. A feature profile can be created programmatically using the [EditorFeatureProfile] class. [b]Note:[/b] The feature profile that gets activated must be located in the [code]feature_profiles[/code] directory, as a file with the [code].profile[/code] extension. If a profile could not be found, an error occurs. The editor configuration folder can be found by using [method EditorPaths.get_config_dir].

members.name: SetMainScreenEditor
members.summary: Sets the editor's current main screen to the one specified in [param name]. [param name] must match the title of the tab in question exactly (e.g. [code]2D[/code], [code]3D[/code], [code skip-lint]Script[/code], [code]Game[/code], or [code]Asset Store[/code] for default tabs).

members.name: SetObjectEdited
members.summary: If [param edited] is [code]true[/code], the object is marked as edited. [b]Note:[/b] This is primarily used by the editor for [Resource] based objects to track their modified state. For example, any changes to an open scene, a resource in the inspector, or an edited script will cause this method to be called with [code]true[/code]. Saving the scene, script, or resource resets the edited state by calling this method with [code]false[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] Each call to this method increments the object's edited version. This is used to track changes in the editor and to trigger when thumbnails should be regenerated for resources.

members.name: SetPluginEnabled
members.signature: public void SetPluginEnabled(String plugin, bool enabled)
members.summary: Sets the enabled status of a plugin. The plugin name is the same as its directory name.

members.name: StopPlayingScene
members.summary: Stops the scene that is currently playing.

members.name: DistractionFreeMode
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], enables distraction-free mode which hides side docks to increase the space available for the main view.

members.name: MovieMakerEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the Movie Maker mode is enabled in the editor. See [MovieWriter] for more information.
